CONTENT.Club career: Victor Sá failed a doping test in May 2017, testing positive for isometheptene and was eligible to play after receiving a 6-month ban, expiring on 26 November 2017.After Oliver Glasner was appointed manager of VfL Wolfsburg, Glasner took Victor Sá with him from LASK Linz to the German club for the 2019–20 season. Victor Sá signed a 4-year contract with VfL Wolfsburg on 10 May 2019.Victor Sá signed for Al Jazira Club in August 2021.On 22 February 2024, Victor Sá signed a contract with Russian Premier League club Krasnodar until June 2025.
CONTENT.External links: Victor Sá at WorldFootball.netVictor Sá at Soccerway

SUMMARY: João Victor Santos Sá (born 27 March 1994), known as João Victor or Victor Sá, is a Brazilian footballer who plays for Russian club Krasnodar as a left winger.
